vc_checking.summary: Both current manual witnesses are semantically provable from the shared addr_avl_tree/store_addr_avl model. Constructor injectivity supplies every pure model equality, the existing shared fold lemmas reconstruct the old root and promoted right-child ownership, and avl_left_rotation is witnessed directly by the exact pre/post models. No annotation/spec repair or new helper declaration is needed.

input_validation.case_lib_contract_observed: compatibility Require Export of QCIPLib.xizi.xizi_avl_common.xizi_avl_lib only

vc_shape.pre_spatial: For the left disjunct: four raw fields of avl_node_pre, store_addr_avl(avl_root_addr right_tree,right_tree), store_addr_avl(avl_root_addr left_tree,left_tree), and the local new_node cell containing avl_root_addr right_tree.
vc_shape.pre_pure: PreH1 identifies before with avl_node_model(avl_node_pre,data,height,left_tree,right_tree); PreH2 and PreH3 give non-null root/right_addr; PreH4 identifies before with the exact root/right-child model using root_data, root_height, a, b, and c.
vc_shape.pre_exists: None in the chosen top-level disjunct; data, height, left_tree, and right_tree are universally quantified values produced by the earlier shared-predicate unfold.
vc_shape.post_spatial: The new_node cell at right_addr, avl_node_fields for the old root with children avl_root_addr(a) and right_addr, store_addr_avl(avl_root_addr(a),a), and store_addr_avl(right_addr,avl_node_model(right_addr,right_data,right_height,b,c)).
vc_shape.post_pure: The two non-null facts and the exact before-model equation already present in the hypotheses.
vc_shape.post_exists: None; close the outer Rocq disjunction with its left branch.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Choose the left side of the outer disjunction. Constructor injectivity on PreH1 and PreH4 identifies data=root_data, height=root_height, left_tree=a, and right_tree=avl_node_model(right_addr,right_data,right_height,b,c); avl_root_addr then reduces to the expected addresses.
witnesses.space_plan: After substituting the constructor equalities, retain both subtree predicates and the new_node points-to unchanged. Fold the four raw old-root field cells with the existing avl_node_fields_fold lemma (or unfold the target definition and cancel); the remaining resources already match the target exactly.
witnesses.pure_plan: Form equality between the two avl_node_model expressions through PreH1 and PreH4, use constructor injectivity, and simplify avl_root_addr. PreH2, PreH3, and PreH4 discharge the remaining pure conjuncts directly; no arithmetic automation is needed.
witnesses.refinement_plan: Not applicable; this is a direct spatial entailment with an address-labelled tree model.

premise_discharge.obligation: old-root field values and child addresses match the public model
premise_discharge.discharged_by: constructor injectivity from PreH1 and PreH4, followed by simplification of avl_root_addr
the lemma has no pure premise; its four raw field resources occur in P

premise_discharge.obligation: root and promoted child are non-null

witnesses.grouping_reason: Shares constructor-injectivity, avl_root_addr simplification, and common AVL fold tactics with the return witness.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: For the left disjunct after both pointer writes: the promoted node's left field points to avl_node_pre; the old root's right field points to avl_root_addr(left_tree); all remaining old-root/promoted-node fields are preserved; and store_addr_avl owns right_tree, left_tree, and a.
vc_shape.pre_pure: PreH1 equates the exact promoted-right-child model with avl_node_model(right_addr,data,height,left_tree,right_tree); PreH2/PreH3 give both node addresses non-null; PreH4 fixes before as the exact unrotated model.
vc_shape.pre_exists: None in the chosen top-level disjunct.
vc_shape.post_spatial: store_addr_avl(right_addr,after), where after is the promoted node whose left subtree is the rebuilt old root and whose right subtree is c.
vc_shape.post_pure: Return-address reflexivity, the exact after-model equality, and avl_left_rotation(before,after).

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Choose the left side of the outer disjunction and instantiate after with the exact rotated model from the Ensure clause. Constructor injectivity on PreH1 gives data=right_data, height=right_height, left_tree=b, and right_tree=c.
witnesses.space_plan: First fold the old root's four raw fields with avl_node_fields_fold, then apply store_addr_avl_node_rev using PreH2 to combine those fields with store_addr_avl(a) and store_addr_avl(b). Next fold the promoted node's four raw fields and apply store_addr_avl_node_rev using PreH3 to combine them with the rebuilt old-root store and store_addr_avl(c). The result is exactly store_addr_avl(right_addr,after).
witnesses.pure_plan: Use constructor injectivity on PreH1 for promoted-node data, cached height, and fringe subtrees. Unfold avl_left_rotation and provide witnesses avl_node_pre, right_addr, root_data, root_height, right_data, right_height, a, b, and c; PreH4 proves the before equality and the chosen after term proves the after equality by reflexivity. No numeric bound or arithmetic fact is needed on this branch.
witnesses.refinement_plan: Not applicable; the rotation relation is a first-order topology relation, not a safeExec/refinement state.

premise_discharge.obligation: old-root store fold requires avl_node_pre <> NULL
promoted-root store fold requires right_addr <> NULL

premise_discharge.discharged_by: unfold avl_left_rotation; instantiate its nine existential parameters from PreH4 and the chosen after model

witnesses.grouping_reason: Uses the same constructor-injectivity and shared AVL fold family as the entail witness, then performs one additional outer-node fold.

analysis_groups.shared_proof_pattern: Select the provable left disjunct, derive component equalities by avl_node_model constructor injectivity, simplify avl_root_addr, and fold common AVL node/tree predicates from the available field and subtree resources.
analysis_groups.shared_space_plan: Use avl_node_fields_fold for raw node cells and store_addr_avl_node_rev for complete tree layers; no resource is missing from either precondition.
analysis_groups.shared_pure_plan: All component equalities come from the exact model equalities in the VC hypotheses; both non-null premises are explicit.
analysis_groups.grouping_reason: Same function, same address-labelled AVL model, same injectivity/fold proof family, and only two witnesses (within the controller limit of 12).

proof_groups.proof_strategy: For each theorem, unfold its definition and choose the left side of the outer disjunction. Derive all addr_avl_tree constructor-component equalities from the exact model hypotheses. For the entail witness, fold the old-root raw fields into avl_node_fields and cancel the already matching subtree/local-variable resources. For the return witness, instantiate the exact rotated after model, fold the old root with avl_node_fields_fold plus store_addr_avl_node_rev, then fold the promoted node the same way; unfold avl_left_rotation and discharge it from PreH4.
proof_groups.natural_language_proof_strategy: Constructor injectivity aligns the symbolic-execution names with the public model, after which existing shared AVL fold lemmas reconstruct exactly the required tree ownership and exact rotation relation.
proof_groups.natural_language_proof_pattern: constructor injectivity -> avl_root_addr simplification -> inner-node fold -> outer-node fold -> exact rotation witness
proving_hints: Prefer the first disjunct of each generated witness; the diagnostics split goals are hints for another generated branch and are not target witnesses.
Use only shared QCIPLib.xizi.xizi_avl_common declarations; do not add a case-private dependency.
No helper is expected: avl_node_fields_fold, store_addr_avl_node_rev, and the definition of avl_left_rotation are sufficient.
Avoid every forbidden lemma listed by the orchestrator; none is needed for this proof pattern.
proof_groups.grouping_reason: Both targets are tightly related obligations from one two-write AVL rotation and share one coherent proof route. A single group minimizes worker spawns while remaining far below max_witnesses_per_group=12.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_entail_wit: left disjunct; inject model equalities; fold avl_node_fields; cancel
per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_return_wit: left disjunct; inject promoted model equality; instantiate after; fold old root then promoted root; unfold rotation relation

existing_library_lemmas.name: avl_node_fields_fold
existing_library_lemmas.premise_discharge: no pure premise; each witness supplies the four raw field cells

existing_library_lemmas.name: store_addr_avl_node_rev
existing_library_lemmas.premise_discharge: the required non-null address is PreH2 for avl_node_pre or PreH3 for right_addr

shared QCIPLib.xizi.xizi_avl_common definitions and strategy proofs needed to identify existing fold lemmas

timing_summary.timing_gap: The JSON handoff supplies neither an activity-ledger path nor a persisted spawn-start timestamp. Rule reading, hash validation, witness analysis, and report composition are therefore not assigned fabricated durations.
timing_summary.major_time_sink: semantic decomposition of the two disjunctive witnesses and audit of the shared fold lemmas
timing_summary.slowest_witness: proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_return_wit_1 because it requires two nested store_addr_avl folds plus explicit avl_left_rotation instantiation

controller_simple_repairs.reason: vc-checking report included an inline group_plan but the default group_plan.json artifact was missing

source_goal_version.digest_input_policy: relative_path+sha256+state+role over generated files and witness statements
